name: shadow-tutor
description: Shadow Tutor — a post-session programming tutor: it makes you predict why the AI made its one load-bearing decision before it reveals, then teaches the why on your own code.

plugins.name: shadow-tutor
plugins.description: After an AI-assisted coding session, it picks the one load-bearing decision you most likely don't truly understand, makes you predict why before it reveals (breaking the "I get it" illusion), and teaches the why — including the rejected alternative — on your own code. Fights the skill atrophy AI coding causes.
